nasb.text: It came about when he came near to Egypt, that he said to Sarai his wife, “See now, I know that you are a beautiful woman;

esv.text: When he was about to enter Egypt, he said to Sarai his wife, “I know that you are a woman beautiful in appearance,

cnv.text: 快要到達埃及的時候，亞伯蘭對他的妻子撒萊說：“看哪，我知道你是個美貌的女人。

ccb.text: 快要到埃及的时候，他对妻子撒莱说：“我知道你是个美貌的女子，

csbs.text: 快要进入埃及时，他对妻子撒莱说：“看哪，我知道你是一个容貌美丽的女人。
